description_long: This is a large, round-bodied terracotta vase with a wide, slightly flared mouth and a short neck. The surface is matte and displays a reddish-brown coloration with visible patches of lighter and darker wear, suggesting age and exposure. Subtle horizontal striations and irregularities are present, likely from the hand-forming process, and there are scattered white marks and scuffs across the body. The base is broad and gently rounded, providing stability for placement on flat surfaces. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding water, plants, or decorative items. Its rustic, utilitarian design is typical of traditional pottery often found in outdoor urban or garden settings.
description: A large, round terracotta vase with a wide mouth, reddish-brown matte finish, and visible wear marks. Its rustic, hand-formed appearance suggests traditional craftsmanship.
description_view_0: The vase is seen with its widest curvature and several white scuff marks on the left side, highlighting surface wear.
description_view_1: This view shows a smoother, less marked side of the vase, emphasizing its even, rounded form and subtle color variations.
description_view_2: The vase appears uniformly colored with minimal visible blemishes, showcasing the gentle transition from the neck to the body.
description_view_3: Distinct horizontal striations and a few prominent white marks are visible, giving this side a more textured and aged look.
